text:
There was once a lonely old man named Oliver. He spent his days collecting seashells by the shore. Despite the beauty around him, he remained lonely because nobody liked his shells. One autumn day, Oliver discovered an old, broken boat floating on the water. It wasn't seaworthy, but perhaps it could carry him somewhere new? With a heart full of dreams, Oliver gathered his collection of shell treasures and sailed off.

Upon reaching his destination, Oliver landed on an isolated island. There, he found a cave with warm, glowing rocks lining the walls. Inside this cave was an old book with mysterious symbols on its pages. Curious and desperate for company, Oliver opened the book and found a dreamlike world within its pages. There, he met an old wizard who advised him to face his loneliness by sharing his shells. The wizard crafted for Oliver a small, enchanted shell, which he named Luna. Oliver began sharing Luna with the animals on the island, and soon friends began to gather
